termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.lead: Public offer of the BALGYN online store. By placing an order on the website, you confirm that you have read and accept the terms below.

s1.heading: 1. General Terms
s1.p1: BALGYN is an online store for machine-embroidered clothing. The product is the embroidery design: when ordering, you choose a design, garment type (hoodie, t-shirt, sweatshirt), color, and size.
s1.p2: This agreement is a public offer. Placing an order through the website cart constitutes acceptance of the offer.

s2.heading: 2. Placing an Order
s2.p1: To place an order, simply provide your name and contact phone number — registration is not required. After placing an order, we will contact you at the provided number or via Telegram to confirm the details.
s2.p2: The order is considered accepted after payment is confirmed. Before payment, the order has the status "Awaiting Payment" and may be automatically cancelled after the payment window expires.

s3.heading: 3. Production & Timing
s3.p1: Each item is embroidered to order. Production time depends on the design complexity and workload, and is communicated upon order confirmation. We send a photo of the finished item before shipping.

s4.heading: 4. Payment & Delivery
s4.before: Available payment and delivery methods and their costs are described on the
s4.after: page. Prices on the website are in tenge (₸).

s5.heading: 5. Returns
s5.before: Return and exchange conditions are described on the
s5.after: page. Items made to individual order (Custom Design section) are non-refundable except in cases of manufacturing defects.

s6.heading: 6. Personal Data
s6.before: Processing of personal data is carried out in accordance with the

s7.heading: 7. Contacts
s7.before: For all questions related to this agreement, write to

returnsPage.title: Returns & Exchanges
returnsPage.lead: We check every item before shipping and send a photo. If something went wrong — here's how we handle it.

s1.heading: Catalog Items
s1.p1: A catalog item in good condition can be exchanged or returned within 14 days of receipt, provided it has not been worn, labels are intact, and the item is in its original condition (Article 30 of the RK Law "On Consumer Protection").
s1.p2: The cost of return shipping for items in good condition is paid by the buyer.

s2.heading: Custom Orders
s2.before: Items made to your design through the
s2.after: section are items with individually defined properties and are non-refundable/non-exchangeable — except in cases of manufacturing defects.

s3.heading: Defect or Order Error
s3.p1: If an item arrived with an embroidery defect, wrong size or color — contact us within 7 days of receipt: send the order number and a photo of the issue. We will replace the item or refund the money — your choice. Return shipping in this case is paid by us.

s4.heading: How to Return
s4.step1after: . Provide the order number and reason.
s4.step2: We will confirm the return and arrange the return shipping method.
s4.step3: Money is returned using the same payment method within 10 business days after receiving the item back.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.lead: What data we collect, why we need it, and what we do with it. In short: only what is necessary to fulfill your order.

s1.heading: 1. What Data We Collect
s1.li1: name and contact phone number — when placing an order;
s1.li2: Telegram username — if you provided it;
s1.li3: delivery address (city, street, zip code, recipient) — for orders with delivery;
s1.li4: email and password — only upon voluntary account registration;
s1.li5: order contents and order history for your account.

s2.heading: 2. How We Use It
s2.li1: order confirmation and fulfillment, status updates;
s2.li2: handing over shipment to the delivery service;
s2.li3: processing payment through the payment provider;
s2.li4: displaying order history in your account.
s2.noSpam: We do not use your data for newsletters without separate consent and do not sell it to third parties.

s3.heading: 3. Who We Share Data With
s3.p1: Only to the extent necessary to fulfill the order: delivery services (CDEK, Kazpost) — recipient's name, phone, and address; payment providers (Freedom Pay, PayPal) — order amount and identifier. We do not receive or store payment card details.

s4.heading: 4. Storage & Security
s4.p1: Data is stored on a secure server. Passwords are stored only as an irreversible hash. Only store administrators have access to order data.
s4.p2: The cart before placing an order is stored locally in your browser and is cleared upon logout.

s5.heading: 5. Your Rights
s5.before: You can request to view, correct, or delete your data — write to us at
s5.after: . Deleting account data does not affect data from already completed orders, which we are required to retain under the laws of the Republic of Kazakhstan.

deliveryPage.title: Delivery & Payment
deliveryPage.lead: Available delivery methods depend on the region and are shown when placing an order. Exact cost is calculated automatically at the "Delivery" step.

pickup.title: Pickup
pickup.desc: Free. Pickup in Almaty by arrangement — we'll agree on place and time after order placement.

courier.title: Courier / Taxi
courier.desc: Delivery within Almaty. Fixed cost is shown when placing the order.

kazpost.title: Kazpost
kazpost.desc: Delivery throughout Kazakhstan. Cost depends on parcel weight.

cdek.title: CDEK
cdek.desc: To a pickup point in your city. Cost and timing are calculated per CDEK rates at checkout.

russia.heading: Russia & CIS
russia.p1: Delivery via CDEK to a pickup point. At checkout you choose a city and pickup point — cost and timing are calculated automatically.

international.heading: Other Countries
international.p1: International postal delivery. Cost depends on country and weight; delivery time — from 14 days. Details will be arranged upon order confirmation.

payment.heading: Payment
payment.p1: After placing an order, payment is available via Freedom Pay (Kazakhstani bank cards) or PayPal (international cards). The order goes into production after payment is confirmed.
payment.p2: Prices on the website are in tenge (₸). Card details are processed by the payment provider — we do not receive or store them.

timing.heading: Timing
timing.p1: Items are embroidered to order: production time is communicated upon confirmation and usually takes several business days. We send a photo of the finished item before shipping.

contactsPage.title: Contacts
contactsPage.lead: We respond as soon as possible within business hours. Fastest via Telegram.
contactsPage.pickupDesc: Almaty city, by arrangement: after placing an order, we'll agree on a convenient pickup location and time by phone or Telegram.
contactsPage.ordersDesc: Please mention your order number — it's shown on the confirmation screen and in your account order history. This helps us respond faster.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.subtitle: BALGYN — clothing with a focus on embroidery and character: hoodies, t-shirts, and custom pieces when details and timing matter.

ceo.bio: I lead brand development and production: from concept and design to final embroidery and shipping. BALGYN's mission is to combine streetwear aesthetics with craft quality — so each piece lasts years, not just a season.
ceo.contact: For collaboration and custom orders, write us on Telegram or by email — we respond within one business day when possible.

howWeWork.heading: How We Work
howWeWork.li1before: Orders are placed on the website: you choose items from the
howWeWork.li3: Production and shipping — after order confirmation; timing depends on workload and embroidery complexity.

quality.heading: Quality & Packaging
quality.p1: We check the fit, embroidery attachment, and packaging before shipping. If something went wrong in transit — write to us, we'll sort it out.

hero.tagline: Embroidered clothing with character. Every piece is handcrafted in Almaty.

story.heading: Our Story
story.p1: Balgyn was born in 2023 as a response to the lack of truly unique clothing in Kazakhstan. Founder Dias Abris created a brand that bridges traditional craft with contemporary streetwear.
story.p2: We don't mass-produce. Every design is a limited run, every garment passes through an embroiderer's hands. A Balgyn piece is a story stitched into fabric.

v1.title: Hand Embroidery
v1.desc: Every design is executed on professional embroidery equipment using premium-grade threads.

v2.title: Limited Runs
v2.desc: Small batches guarantee exclusivity — your piece won't be on everyone else.

v3.title: Made in Almaty
v3.desc: Production in Kazakhstan. We create local jobs and take pride in our roots.

custom.heading: Custom Design
custom.desc: Bring your idea, logo, or sketch — we'll turn it into embroidery. We work with corporate orders, team uniforms, and personalized gifts.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything about Balgyn, orders, and delivery
faq.q1: How do I place an order?
faq.a1: Browse the catalog, choose a design, select garment type, color, and size, add to cart, and checkout. You only need to provide your name and phone number — no registration required.
faq.a2: We offer sizes XS–3XL depending on the garment type. A detailed size chart is available on each design page.
faq.q3: Can I order a custom design?
faq.a3: Yes! Use the Custom Design section: describe your idea and leave your contact details. We'll create the embroidery based on your sketch or concept.
faq.a4: We accept Kaspi, Halyk, Visa and Mastercard via Freedom Pay; PayPal for international payments; Mir, Visa, Mastercard via VTB Kazakhstan.
faq.a5: Standard turnaround is 7–14 business days. For custom designs, the timeline is agreed individually at the time of ordering.
faq.q6: How is delivery handled in Kazakhstan?
faq.a6: Within Kazakhstan: CDEK to a pickup point, taxi/courier in Almaty, or pickup in person. Exact cost and timing are calculated automatically at checkout.
faq.a7: Yes, we ship to Russia, Belarus, and other CIS countries via CDEK, and worldwide by international post. Timelines vary by destination.
faq.q8: How can I track my order?
faq.a8: Use the Track Order section on our website. After shipping, your CDEK tracking number will appear in the My Orders section of your account.
faq.a9: T-shirts — 100% cotton, 200 g/m². Sweatshirts — 300 g/m². Hoodies — 320 g/m². We use both embroidery and DTF printing. Embroidery threads are high-quality polyester with excellent color fastness.
faq.a10: Exchange is only possible in the case of an error on our part (wrong size, manufacturing defect, or order fulfillment error). Custom items made to the client's individual design cannot be returned or exchanged.
faq.q11: How do I care for embroidered items?
faq.a11: Machine wash inside-out at 30–40°C. Iron only on the reverse side. Avoid bleach and harsh dry-cleaning chemicals.
faq.a12: Instagram: @balgyn.bol · Telegram: @balgyn.bol · WhatsApp: +7 708 193 75 10 · Email: balgyn.studio@gmail.com. Mon–Fri, 10:00–18:00 (GMT+5).
faq.q13: What is the easiest way to track my order with CDEK?
faq.a13: The best way is to download the official CDEK app. Sign in with the same phone number you used when placing your order — your shipment will appear automatically. The app provides: current status and route, push notifications on status changes, QR codes for pickup, and delivery history.

cta.heading: Didn't find your answer?
cta.desc: Reach out however's easiest for you.

tracking.noTrackingYet: The tracking number will be available once the order is handed over to the carrier.
tracking.hint: Once the order is dispatched, we will add a tracking number. Click "Track order" to open the carrier's official website. If the number isn't pre-filled, simply copy and paste it into the search field.
